---
title: "Clustering analysis"
author: "Alex Koiter"
---





## Load libraries





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(terra)
  library(patchwork)
  library(sf)
  library(randomForest)
  library(tidyterra)
})
```
:::





## Load data





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
ag_data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/ag_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) 


forest_data <- read_csv(here::here("./notebooks/forest_terrain_data.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) 
```
:::






## Elbow plot functions





::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
# Define function to compute WSS for a single cluster
wss <- function(d) {
  sum(scale(d, scale = FALSE)^2)
}

# Wrapper function to apply WSS calculation across clusters for a given k
wrap <- function(i, hc, x) {
  cl <- cutree(hc, i)  # Cut tree into i clusters
  spl <- split(x, cl)  # Split data by cluster membership
  total_wss <- sum(sapply(spl, wss))  # Sum WSS across all clusters
  total_wss
}
```
:::





## Terrain Atributes




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
attributes <- c("saga_wetness_index", "relative_slope_position", "elevation", "profile_curvature", "plan_curvature","channel_network_distance","catchment_area")
```
:::





## Agricultural site




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
set.seed(123)
# Principle component
ag_pc <- prcomp(dplyr::select(ag_data, all_of(attributes)), center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)$x |> 
  as.data.frame()

# Unsuperivsied classification

rf_ag_fit <- randomForest(x = dplyr::select(ag_data, any_of(attributes)), y = NULL, ntree = 500, importance = TRUE)

# Cluster analysis
hclust_ag_rf <- hclust(as.dist(1-rf_ag_fit$proximity), method = "ward.D2")

# #plot(hclust_ag_rf)
```
:::





### Elbow plot




::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
# Compute WSS for k = 1 to 10
k_values <- 1:10
wss_values <- sapply(k_values, wrap, hc = hclust_ag_rf, x = dplyr::select(ag_data, any_of(attributes)))

# Plot the elbow plot
plot(k_values, wss_values,
     type = "b",
     pch = 19,
     xlab = "Number of Clusters (k)",
     ylab = "Total Within-Cluster Sum of Squares (WSS)",
     main = "Elbow Method for Optimal k")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-6-1.png)
:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
rf_cluster_ag <- cutree(hclust_ag_rf, k=2)
ag_pc$rf.clusters <- rf_cluster_ag

ag_pc_plot <- ggplot(data = ag_pc, aes(x= PC2, y = PC1, colour = factor(rf.clusters))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c( "#D4CB92", "#80A4ED")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  labs(colour = "Cluster") +
  theme(legend.position="none")

ag_pc_plot
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-6-2.png)
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
cluster_map_ag <- ag_data |>
  dplyr::select(x, y) |>
  bind_cols(rf_cluster_ag) |>
  rename(cluster = ...3) |>
  rast()|>
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(cluster))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
New names:
• `` -> `...3`
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
crs(x = cluster_map_ag, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"

ag_cluster_map <- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = cluster_map_ag, aes(fill = cluster)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c( "#D4CB92", "#80A4ED")) +
  labs(fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position="right",
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br", height = grid::unit(0.6, "cm"), width = grid::unit(0.6, "cm"))

ag_cluster_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-7-1.png)
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
forest_pc <- prcomp(dplyr::select(forest_data, all_of(attributes)), center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)$x |> 
  as.data.frame()

set.seed(123)
rf_forest_fit <- randomForest(x = dplyr::select(forest_data, all_of(attributes)), y = NULL, ntree = 500, importance = TRUE)

hclust_forest_rf <- hclust(as.dist(1-rf_forest_fit$proximity), method = "average")

#plot(hclust_forest_rf)

# Compute WSS for k = 1 to 10
k_values <- 1:10
wss_values <- sapply(k_values, wrap, hc = hclust_forest_rf, x = dplyr::select(forest_data, plan_curvature:elevation))

# Plot the elbow plot
plot(k_values, wss_values,
     type = "b",
     pch = 19,
     xlab = "Number of Clusters (k)",
     ylab = "Total Within-Cluster Sum of Squares (WSS)",
     main = "Elbow Method for Optimal k")
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-8-1.png)
:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
rf_cluster_forest <- cutree(hclust_forest_rf, k=3)
forest_pc$rf.clusters <- rf_cluster_forest

forest_pc_plot <- ggplot(data = forest_pc, aes(x= PC2, y = PC1, colour = factor(rf.clusters))) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5) +
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("#E6E1C5", "#D4CB92", "#80A4ED")) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  labs(colour = "Cluster") +
  theme(legend.position="none")
forest_pc_plot
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-8-2.png)
:::
:::

::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
cluster_map <- forest_data |>
  dplyr::select(x, y) |>
  bind_cols(rf_cluster_forest) |>
  rename(cluster = ...3) |>
  rast() |>
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(cluster))
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr .hidden}

```
New names:
• `` -> `...3`
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
crs(x = cluster_map, warn=FALSE) <- "epsg:26914"

forest_cluster_map <- ggplot() +
  tidyterra::geom_spatraster(data = cluster_map, aes(fill = cluster)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#E6E1C5", "#D4CB92", "#80A4ED")) +
  labs(fill = "Cluster") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(legend.position="right",
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0,0)) +
  ggspatial::annotation_scale(location = "bl") +
  ggspatial::annotation_north_arrow(location = "br", height = grid::unit(0.6, "cm"), width = grid::unit(0.6, "cm"))
forest_cluster_map
```

::: {.cell-output-display}
![](clustering_analysis_files/figure-jats/unnamed-chunk-9-1.png)
:::
:::

::: {#cell-fig-cluster .cell}

```{.r .cell-code .hidden}
#| label: fig-cluster
#| fig-cap: Maps and PCA plots demonstrating the clustering analysis of terrain attributes for the forest site (a, b) and the agricultural site (c, d).

cluster_plots <- forest_pc_plot + forest_cluster_map + ag_pc_plot + ag_cluster_map + plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'a', tag_suffix = ')') + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.05))
cluster_plots
```
